mapper.sql: id, ro_id, modelno, warehouse_code, qty, inventory_type, receive_code, scan_type, invoiceNo, msg_id, delflag, creator, cre_time, modify_time, modifier, receiveTime, username, invoiceId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_ro_post
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_ro_post (id, ro_id, modelno, warehouse_code, qty, inventory_type, receive_code, scan_type, invoiceNo, msg_id, delflag, creator, cre_time, modify_time, modifier, receiveTime, username, invoiceId ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiveCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scanType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{receivetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{username,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

update dbo.ops_ro_post
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

receiveTime = #{record.receivetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
username = #{record.username,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update dbo.ops_ro_post set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ro_id = #{record.roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_type = #{record.inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receive_code = #{record.receiveCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scan_type = #{record.scanType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, msg_id = #{record.msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, receiveTime = #{record.receivetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, username = #{record.username,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, invoiceId = #{record.invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_ro_post
ro_id = #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_type = #{inventoryType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
receiveTime = #{receivetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
username = #{username,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
invoiceId = #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
